message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 240 migrate 5 human-cli audit sites cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues ticks 237-239's storage-write surface migration. 5 more
sites — 1 human send audit + 4 human events-command cluster:

1. L24578 human send audit:
   `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, audit_record)`
2. L25822 human event.annotate:
   `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, audit)`
3. L25901 human event.triage:
   `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, audit)`
4. L25981 human event.label set (via replace_all)
5. L26029 human event.label clear (via replace_all)

Sites 4+5 migrated via `replace_all=true` since they had identical
surrounding code structure — single edit, 2 migrations. Matches
the robot-side tick-238 pattern.

All sites use standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
with locally-scoped `storage_cx` binding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 17/~22 storage-write sites in main.rs migrated.

Remaining 5 sites:
- L26740 workflow-prepare audit
- L26953 commit-prepare audit
- L27288 commit-record audit
- L27367 workflow-commit audit
- L27628 plan-commit audit

Next tick closes the main.rs storage-write surface entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
